response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The lyrics reference perfectly matches the song 'LOAD' sung in the second half of the video. The first half is banter which was manually transcribed and translated.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the lyrics reference for the second half of the video. Discarded the trailing portion of the lyrics as the video ends.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed dialogue strictly to character vocal cues, using instant transitions where speech is rapid, and separating block segments around clear pauses. Let Chihaya's exit banter play out with tight timing.

subtitles.original: はい、そしてライブの後半には、サプライズや重大発表もありますので、
subtitles.english: Also, in the second half of the concert, we have surprises and a major announcement,

subtitles.original: ぜひ最後まで楽しんでいただけると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: so we hope you'll enjoy it to the very end!

subtitles.original: お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please enjoy!

subtitles.original: まばたきしないでね！
subtitles.english: Don't blink!

subtitles.original: てかさ、ちはやさん
subtitles.english: By the way, Chihaya-san...

subtitles.original: 何ですか？
subtitles.english: Yes?

subtitles.original: フグ太郎置いてるのマズいかな？
subtitles.english: Isn't it bad to leave Fugutaro parked out there?

subtitles.original: ダメなの？ / かっこいいよ！
subtitles.english: Is it bad? / It looks cool though!

subtitles.original: 東京あの、路上駐車ダメ、警察来ちゃうよ、切られちゃうよ
subtitles.english: Street parking is bad in Tokyo, they'll ticket you!

subtitles.original: 駐禁切られちゃうよ / 路上駐車ダメ、ダメ
subtitles.english: We'll get a parking ticket! / No street parking!

subtitles.original: おまわりさん来ちゃうから
subtitles.english: Because the police will come!

subtitles.original: やめなさい！ / だめだめ！
subtitles.english: Stop it! / No, no!

subtitles.original: だから、まあ、繋いどくから、止めてきてもらって
subtitles.english: So we'll hold down the fort here, go park it.

subtitles.original: あ、止めてきていい？
subtitles.english: Ah, can I go park it?

subtitles.original: 交代してくれる？
subtitles.english: Can you go instead?

subtitles.original: もちろん、もちろん！ / 待ってるからね
subtitles.english: Of course, of course! / We'll wait for you!

subtitles.original: 行ってきます！
subtitles.english: I'm off!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、次の曲いこうか！
subtitles.english: Well, shall we go to the next song?

subtitles.original: ね！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: 冗談はさておき、
subtitles.english: Jokes aside,

subtitles.original: 1曲目から『FG Roadster』と『24K Gold』をメドレー形式でお送りしてきました！
subtitles.english: we kicked off with a medley of "FG Roadster" and "24K Gold"!

subtitles.original: なんと、その『FG Roadster』のサビの振り付けは、
subtitles.english: And actually, the choreography for the chorus of "FG Roadster"...

subtitles.original: すーちゃんがしてくれたんだよね！
subtitles.english: ...was done by Su-chan!

subtitles.original: おぉー！
subtitles.english: Whoa!

subtitles.original: やっぱりね、ちょっとカッコいい感じで、あ、バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Yeah, with a cool vibe... Ah, bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 路上駐車、守れよ！
subtitles.english: Make sure you park legally!

subtitles.original: そう、カッコいい感じでね、こっからの振りを私、作らせていただいたんですけど、
subtitles.english: Right, I got to make the choreography from here with a cool style.

subtitles.original: カッコいいよね！ / 好きだよ
subtitles.english: It's so cool! / I love it!

subtitles.original: 皆さんにもね、ぜひいつか踊ってください。よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Everyone, please try dancing to it sometime!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please do!

subtitles.original: ビビたんはメドレーやってみてどうだった？
subtitles.english: Vivi-tan, how was performing the medley?

subtitles.original: やっぱりずっとね、みんなに初めて披露した時から、あ、リリースした時から、
subtitles.english: Well, ever since we first showed everyone—ah, ever since we released it—

subtitles.original: 歌とダンス一緒に見てもらいたいなと思ってたから、
subtitles.english: I always wanted everyone to see the song and dance together,

subtitles.original: こうやってついに皆さんに見てもらうことができて、めっちゃ嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: so I'm super happy that we finally got to show you like this!

subtitles.original: カッコよかったやろ？
subtitles.english: We looked cool, right?

subtitles.original: カッコよかった！
subtitles.english: You looked so cool!

subtitles.original: にこはどうやった？
subtitles.english: How about you, Niko?

subtitles.original: にこも楽しかった！やっぱいろんな曲をさ、くっつけてね、踊るとかね。
subtitles.english: I had fun too! Putting different songs together and dancing...

subtitles.original: ちょっと今、頭真っ白で何喋ってるか全然わかんないや
subtitles.english: Actually, my mind is blank right now, I don't know what I'm saying.

subtitles.original: りおなはどうだった？
subtitles.english: How about you, Riona?

subtitles.original: そうだね、でもやっぱデビュー当、当、と、と、と、と、
subtitles.english: Yeah, but after all, at our deb-deb-de-de-de...

subtitles.original: デビュー当時ね！
subtitles.english: At our debut!

subtitles.original: 緊張して、と、と、と、と、と...
subtitles.english: I'm so nervous, de-de-de-de...

subtitles.original: りおなちゃん！深呼吸！深呼吸！
subtitles.english: Riona-chan! Deep breath! Deep breath!

subtitles.original: (深呼吸)
subtitles.english: (all taking deep breaths)

subtitles.original: どうした？どうした？何してるの？
subtitles.english: What's going on? What are you guys doing?

subtitles.original: りおなが震えてるから助けてくれ
subtitles.english: Riona is shaking, save us!

subtitles.original: メドレーの感想ね、言いたかったんだけど、
subtitles.english: I wanted to share my thoughts on the medley,

subtitles.original: うち等緊張してボロボロになっちゃって...
subtitles.english: but we got so nervous we messed up...

subtitles.original: 任せて！
subtitles.english: Leave it to me!

subtitles.original: やっぱりね、デビューしてから2曲、出したね、オリジナル曲を
subtitles.english: After all, since our debut, we've released two original songs,

subtitles.original: こうやって皆さんの前で動きがありでね、あの披露することができて、
subtitles.english: and being able to perform them with choreography in front of everyone like this,

subtitles.original: 本当にね、素敵でしたし、もうこれからもね、Flow Glow のこと、
subtitles.english: was really wonderful. And from now on, please continue...

subtitles.original: ずっと、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: ...to support Flow Glow forever!

subtitles.original: 早い早い！泣くの早い！まだ曲あるから！
subtitles.english: Too early! You're crying too early! We still have more songs!

subtitles.original: あ、もう一曲あるのね、これからこれから！
subtitles.english: Ah, we have more? Right, this is just the beginning!

subtitles.original: ありがとうね、でもちはや、ありがとう。あ、止めてきてくれたのもありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you though, Chihaya. And thank you for going to park it.

subtitles.original: そうだよ、ちょっとね、なんかファンの人の車が多すぎて、
subtitles.english: Yeah, actually, there were so many fans' cars...

subtitles.original: 全然空いてなくて
subtitles.english: that there was no space at all.

subtitles.original: ファンの人の車？！ / ファンのみんなも路上駐車しちゃダメだよ！
subtitles.english: The fans' cars?! / Don't park on the street, guys!

subtitles.original: 帰りは気をつけようね、危ないからね
subtitles.english: Be careful on your way home, it's dangerous.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、そろそろみんなもライブ観たいのかなって思うので、次の曲に参りたいと思います
subtitles.english: Now then, I think everyone wants to see the live show, so let's move on to the next song.

subtitles.original: はーい！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: ついでに、モニターもなんか新しいものになりました！
subtitles.english: By the way, the monitors have been upgraded to something new!

subtitles.original: おぉー！
subtitles.english: Whoa!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: じゃあね、まだまだライブは続くので、ますます盛り上がっていきましょう！
subtitles.english: The live show still continues, so let's get even more hyped up!

subtitles.original: それでは聴いてください、『LOAD』
subtitles.english: Now please listen to: "LOAD".

subtitles.original: 読み込みが完了しました！
subtitles.english: Loading completed!

subtitles.original: 世界中に配信するライブ ここはホロ
subtitles.english: Broadcasting live to the world, this is Holo

subtitles.original: 80億の星のlights 照らす心
subtitles.english: Lights of 8 billion stars illuminate the heart

subtitles.original: 通知がなる it's time to show my digital world
subtitles.english: Notifications ringing, it's time to show my digital world

subtitles.original: 寝かせない朝まで カーソル合わせ文字の上
subtitles.english: Won't let you sleep until morning, aligning the cursor over the characters

subtitles.original: スタジオにいる今日も歌詞を書いてるノートに
subtitles.english: I'm in the studio, writing lyrics in my notebook again today

subtitles.original: 変わる景色、相当 気づけばいたよ東京
subtitles.english: The changing scenery, quite a lot, realized I've arrived in Tokyo

subtitles.original: 夜空をみる首都高 乗る月に向かうボート
subtitles.english: Looking at the night sky, Shuto Expressway, boarding a boat heading to the moon

subtitles.original: みんなに見せる証拠 力になれること、を
subtitles.english: Showing everyone the proof, that I can be your strength

subtitles.original: ネガなマインド捨て 見てるだけじゃ意味ない
subtitles.english: Throwing away negative thoughts, just watching is meaningless

subtitles.original: 夢じゃなくなった夢
subtitles.english: A dream that is no longer just a dream

subtitles.original: 負けず嫌いで有名
subtitles.english: Famous for being competitive

subtitles.original: どこにもない終点
subtitles.english: An endpoint that doesn't exist anywhere

subtitles.original: 君と見た星空の下 届きそうな手
subtitles.english: Under the starry sky I saw with you, hands that seem to reach out

subtitles.original: このデバイスがあれば どこへでも
subtitles.english: If you have this device, I feel like I can go anywhere

subtitles.original: 行ける気がするよ
subtitles.english: I feel like I can go anywhere

subtitles.original: 続くone way
subtitles.english: Continuing one way

subtitles.original: stay with me by my side
subtitles.english: stay with me by my side

subtitles.original: 遠いとこへ
subtitles.english: To a distant place

subtitles.original: 2人で
subtitles.english: Just the two of us

subtitles.original: この地球からvirtual world
subtitles.english: From this Earth to a virtual world

subtitles.original: 気にしない今何時
subtitles.english: Don't care what time it is now

subtitles.original: 何万キロ離れても
subtitles.english: No matter how many thousands of kilometers apart

subtitles.original: my team flow glow
subtitles.english: my team flow glow

subtitles.original: すぐ行動開始 チャット止まない24
subtitles.english: Start taking action immediately, chat never stops 24/7

subtitles.original: 調子がいい今日 カメラにするはいチーズ
subtitles.english: In good condition today, posing for the camera, cheese!

subtitles.original: 乗っ取ってる電波塔から
subtitles.english: Broadcasting from the taken-over radio tower

subtitles.original: 放送する 世界に配信
subtitles.english: Broadcasting, distributing to the world

subtitles.original: みてみなこのスタイル
subtitles.english: Look at this style

subtitles.original: yeah 負ける気すらない
subtitles.english: yeah, I don't even have the thought of losing

subtitles.original: 捨てていく無駄なpride
subtitles.english: Throwing away useless pride

subtitles.original: できるよこのくらい
subtitles.english: I can do this much

subtitles.original: みんなで今夜もparty all night
subtitles.english: Everyone partying all night again tonight

subtitles.original: 日々日々に上がるprice
subtitles.english: Price rising day by day

subtitles.original: やれるならu better try
subtitles.english: If you can do it, you better try

subtitles.original: 世界中に配信するライブ ここはホロ
subtitles.english: Broadcasting live to the world, this is Holo

subtitles.original: 80億 of 星のlights 照らす心
subtitles.english: Lights of 8 billion stars illuminate the heart

subtitles.original: 通知がなる it's time to show my digital world
subtitles.english: Notifications ringing, it's time to show my digital world

subtitles.english: Won't let you sleep until morning, aligning the cursor over the characters
